typePredicateParameterMismatch.tlua(10,4): error TLUA1225: Cannot find parameter 'value'.
typePredicateParameterMismatch.tlua(16,5): error TLUA2584: Cannot find name 'console'. Do you need to change your target library? Try changing the 'lib' compiler option to include 'dom'.


==== typePredicateParameterMismatch.tlua (2 errors) ====
    // This test verifies that the checker doesn't panic when a type predicate
    // references a parameter name that doesn't match any actual function parameter.
    
    type TypeA = { kind: 'a' };
    type TypeB = { kind: 'b' };
    type UnionType = TypeA | TypeB;
    
    function isTypeA(
      _value: UnionType
    ): value is TypeA {  // "value" doesn't match parameter "_value"
       ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1225: Cannot find parameter 'value'.
      return true;
    }
    
    function test(input: UnionType): void {
      if (isTypeA(input)) {
        console.log(input.kind);
        ~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2584: Cannot find name 'console'. Do you need to change your target library? Try changing the 'lib' compiler option to include 'dom'.
      }
    }
